title: Akshaya Tritiya - Day of Eternal Blessings
shortDescription: One of the most powerful days of the year for charity. Donations made on this day bring eternal blessings and never-diminishing wealth.

title: Sita Navami - Celebrate Devi Sita's Birth
shortDescription: Worshipping Sita-Ram and donating food or clothes to the poor on this day brings peace and prosperity to families.

title: Vaishakha Purnima (Buddha Purnima)
shortDescription: Highly sacred for donating water and food. Join us in engaging in charity to relieve suffering for the underprivileged.

title: Shani Jayanti - Reduce Effects of Karma
shortDescription: The best day to reduce effects of bad karma through charity. Donating black clothing and footwear to the needy is recommended.

title: Nirjala Ekadashi - Powerful Jal Daan
shortDescription: The most powerful Ekadashi for water donation. Join our effort in setting up Pyau (water stalls) and serving chilled drinks.
